calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-23-2025 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order
Off Calendar Apr-17-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in Open Court. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF ALIGN TECHNOLOGY, INC.'s Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order.

Plaintiff Align Technology, Inc.'s motion for assignment of rights, restraining order and turnover order, for which no opposition was received, is GRANTED.

Moving Party is advised going forward the court will not accept or will order off calendar motions not noticed for a single department and/or not noticed for the correct department and assigned bench officer.

Moving Party is admonished that the court will order off calendar any motion where the moving party fails to timely submit a coherent proposed order that is consistent with the motion.

Moving Party is ordered to submit a proposed order that includes the above text no later than 8:30 am on April 17, 2025. Moving Party shall send the proposed order by email to contestdept302tr@sftc.org. failure to do so may result in the court ordering the motion off calendar.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-27-2025 Continued To May-14-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Default Prove-Up Hearing Pursuant To C.C.P. Section
Off Calendar Feb-24-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:42 am, pausing at 9:54 am, resuming at 10:59 am and concluding at 11:07 am.

Plaintiff Align Technology, Inc. is represented by Dabid J Cook, Esq. via zoom video conference.
Defendant Gulia Omene not appearing.

Plaintiff presents summary of facts, claims and an offer of proof.

MARCO PADILLA is sworn to testify on behalf of Plaintiff and testifies.

Plaintiff confirms that the requested Judgment will resolve the entire action.

COURT FINDS:
1. The complaint filed Oct-10-2024 is the operative pleading.
2. The DOES in this matter were dismissed on Dec-03-2024.
3. Default against Defendant Gulia Omene entered on Dec-03-2024.

Good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Align Technology, Inc., and against Defendant Gulia Omene DMD LLC, DBA Main Line Dental Club, as follows:

1. Damages: $31,540.46
2. Prejudgment Interest: @10%
3. Costs: $1,325.00
4. Attorney fees: $1,000.00

Plaintiffs counsel to submit proposed judgment for review and signature. (D505)
